code:
import io
import string

fn cap(_ w: String) -> String
  match string.byte_at(w, 0)
  when Some(b)
    if b >= 97 and b <= 122
      let upper = b - 32
      "#{string.from_byte(upper)}#{string.substring(w, 1, string.len(w))}"
    else
      w
    end
  when None
    w
  end
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = words.len()
  while i < n
    match words.get(i)
    when Some(w)
      if i == 0
        result = cap(w)
      else
        result = "#{result} #{cap(w)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
when None
  println("")
end
